message:
fix(package): include CHANGELOG.md so cargo publish verify can compile

`src/interactive/commands.rs` and `src/interactive.rs` use
`include_str!("../CHANGELOG.md")` for in-CLI release notes display, but the
`include = [...]` allowlist excluded CHANGELOG.md from the published tarball.
`cargo publish --dry-run` then failed at the verify-tarball step:

    error: couldn't read `src/interactive/../../CHANGELOG.md`: No such file
    error: couldn't read `src/../CHANGELOG.md`: No such file

Add CHANGELOG.md to the include allowlist. Verified by `cargo publish` of
0.1.13 to crates.io.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,6 +26,10 @@ include = [
     "Cargo.toml",
     "LICENSE",
     "README.md",
+    # Pulled in by `include_str!("../../CHANGELOG.md")` in
+    # src/interactive/commands.rs and src/interactive.rs — without it the
+    # `cargo publish --dry-run` verify step fails to build the packaged tarball.
+    "CHANGELOG.md",
     "build.rs",
     "src/**",
 ]
